name: Airlines Domain
description: Airline customer service supervisor with flight search, policy advisor, and analytics agents. Includes SearchAI test documents and vocabulary for domain-specific search.

Airlines_Supervisor.description: Routes airline customer queries to the appropriate specialist agent

Flight_Search.description: Handles flight availability queries using vocabulary resolution and structured search

Policy_Advisor.description: Answers airline policy questions using semantic search over policy documents

Analytics.description: Answers analytical questions using vocabulary resolution and aggregation queries

search-tools.description: SearchAI tools for vocabulary resolution, structured search, hybrid search, vector search, and aggregation
